characterLimit.description: Optional max character limit for parsed markdown release notes.

waitUntil.description: Optional browser wait condition for navigation.

waitForSelector.description: Optional selector to wait for before capturing markdown.

cleanup.description: Cleanup release notes with AI. Enabled by default for browser rendering sources.

owner.description: GitHub repository owner. Optional when strategy is github-release (defaults to github.owner).

repo.description: GitHub repository name. Optional when strategy is github-release (defaults to github.repo).

tag.description: Tag template for the release notes lookup. Supports {version}. Optional when strategy is github-release (uses resolved release tag).

cleanup.description: Cleanup release notes with AI. Disabled by default for GitHub sources.

sourceUrl.description: Endpoint returning JSON release notes content or URLs. Supports {version}.

releaseNotesUrl.description: Optional URL to set in the manifest ReleaseNotesUrl field. Supports {version} placeholders in URL.

path.description: Dot-separated path to release notes content or URL.

nestedSource.description: Source format for nested release notes content. Supports html, markdown, and plain-text.

cleanup.description: Cleanup release notes with AI. Defaults to the nestedSource cleanup behavior.

sourceUrl.description: Endpoint returning YAML release notes content or URLs. Supports {version}.

releaseNotesUrl.description: Optional URL to set in the manifest ReleaseNotesUrl field. Supports {version} placeholders in URL.

path.description: Dot-separated path to release notes content or URL.

nestedSource.description: Source format for nested release notes content. Supports html, markdown, and plain-text.

cleanup.description: Cleanup release notes with AI. Defaults to the nestedSource cleanup behavior.

releaseNotesUrl.description: URL to set in the manifest ReleaseNotesUrl field. Supports {version} placeholders.

replace.description: Replace latest version with new version.

versionRemove.description: Substring(s) to strip after auto-leading 'v' removal.

installerMatches.description: Executable names used to match installers inside an archive.

url.description: URL whose response header is used as the persisted state.

header.description: Response header containing the persisted state.

value.description: Persisted state value. Supports resolved placeholders.

state.description: Optional state used to skip unchanged updates.

urls.description: Template or literal URLs. Supports {version}, named values such as {captures.name}, and {value|from|to} replacement.
